jmdictSenseGlosses: if it is the case that
indicates word or phrase being defined
excuse me! (when calling out to someone)
to get on (train, plane, bus, ship, etc.)
to stand on end (e.g. of hairs)
at (a time, stage in life, etc.)
to leave (a matter, decision, etc. to someone)
to also be (implies that as well as the earlier stated this is also the case)
to pay undue (amount of) attention to (something)
to give (esp. to someone of lower status)
to plan to make one's own
a long time (since the last time)
back (of a drawer, one's throat, etc.)
feeling light (i.e. offering little resistance, moving easily)
I look forward to working with you
of the order of (following a number)
side (of something, or taking someone's side)
to aim at (for, to do, to become)
I've had enough (e.g. when offered something)
